summary: W908 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W907's bundled W717 relation-data provider with the relation-pullback and target-relation-lift provider fields. W908 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W908 fields are the right-open closed-quotient-cover boundary, the source-difference cokernel pi-zero boundary, relation-pullback data, target-relation-lift data, W715 target-surjective-compact data, selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 closed-map diagram component fields, the raw mapped explicit cokernel IsClosedMap field, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, W722 source-triangulation data, W856 endpoint topology facts, and W721 localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
